class.name: FestivalOutfit
class.brief_description: A wearable costume identity in the Festival of Disguises.
class.description: During the festival, islanders believe a costume identity is real, so the outfit Alex wears is the strongest lever over how NPCs perceive them. The [member role] and [member authority] feed the perception rule evaluated by [FestivalDirector]: a [code]constable[/code] outfit can unlock confessions or fear, a [code]merchant[/code] outfit can change trade access and pricing.

members.member: How much social authority the outfit grants. Higher values unlock higher-access interactions.
The raw Secret Census source record, kept so no exported detail is lost.
If [code]true[/code], wearing the outfit grants extra powers described by [member powers].
Unique identifier used by the registry and interaction gates.
Ids of dialogue interactions that only unlock while this outfit is worn.
Describes the extra powers granted when [member grants_extra_power] is [code]true[/code].
The perceived social role, for example [code]constable[/code], [code]merchant[/code] or [code]civilian[/code].

Raw StageAvailability records, each a [Dictionary] with camelCase keys [code]gameState[/code], [code]locationType[/code], [code]locationId[/code] and [code]availableByNormalMeans[/code] (part of the Secret Census import contract).
